transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-27]
[00:00] You: Customer success sync. Let's go through our top accounts and their health scores.
[00:40] Speaker 1: Pinnacle Retail went from green to yellow last week. Usage dropped 35%. I'll reach out to their primary contact today to understand what changed.
[01:20] Speaker 2: I reviewed their usage data — they stopped using the bulk export feature after the July 14th update. I'll check if there was a breaking change. I'll have an answer by July 28th.
[02:00] Speaker 3: For Meridian Health, they've been asking for a dedicated onboarding session for their new team members. I'll schedule a 2-hour onboarding workshop for the week of August 3rd.
[02:45] You: Good. What about the NPS survey results?
[03:00] Speaker 4: NPS came back at 42. Three detractors gave specific feedback about slow load times. I'll compile those comments and share with the product team by July 29th.
[03:35] Speaker 1: I'll also set up individual check-in calls with all three detractors. I'll have those scheduled by July 30th.
[04:00] Speaker 2: We should also review our onboarding email sequence — the open rates have dropped. I'll audit the email sequence performance and propose changes by August 4th.
[04:35] You: Good idea. Speaker 3, can you update our health score model to include feature adoption?
[04:50] Speaker 3: I'll update the health score model to weight feature adoption more heavily. I'll have the updated model in our CRM by August 6th.
[05:20] Speaker 4: We're also missing QBR presentations for 4 enterprise accounts. I'll create QBR templates and schedule those calls by August 11th.
[05:50] You: The quarterly CS report goes to leadership on August 15th. Speaker 1, can you own that?
[06:05] Speaker 1: I'll compile the quarterly customer success report by August 13th and share it with leadership by August 15th.

Health score model to be updated to include feature adoption weighting
